name: Spectrum Ultra Premium Adult Dog Food - Sensitive26 Medium / Large Breed 12kg
description: SPECTRUM Sensitive 26 (Medium & Large Breeds) , is a specially formulated complete and balanced ultra-premium food to meet the nutritional requirements of adult dogs greater than 10kg. Boosted by outstanding palatability and lamb protein to ensure food intake and support appetite in fussy dog breeds. CELL PROTECTION: SPECTRUM Sensitive 26 contains a blend of titrated natural plant extracts to counter cell damage and strengthens immunity SKIN DEFENSE: SPECTRUM Sensitive26 contains astaxanthin and marine essential fatty acids help to maintain skin elasticity and to limit skin irritation. DIGESTIVE SECURITY: XOS in SPECTRUM Sensitive 26?neutralises potentially pathogenic bacteria and contributes to the stabilisation of the beneficial intestinal flora. This strengthens indirectly protein metabolism and production of volatile fatty acids, an energy source for the intestinal cells. A stabilised intestinal flora combined with local increased energy production creates optimal conditions for food efficiency. TASTINESS: SPECTRUM Sensitive26 is coated with last generation flavouring aromas to ensure outstanding palatability and long-term acceptance. SYNOX 3D: a blend of natural, standardised GMO free - titrated plant extracts (Rosemary, grape seed, curcuma, citrus and cloves) clinical proven in cats to counter free radicals induced by oxidative cell damage . Free radicals are essential for life. However, ageing is linked to an increased production of free radicals and a decreased ability to counter their negative effects on health and wellbeing. SYNOX 3D limits the production of malondialdehyde, one of the main toxic metabolites of oxidative stress, protecting cell membrane, mitochondria and genetic material of each individual cell. The unique composition of SYNOX 3D is the result of a screening process on 134 plant extracts, combined with trials in laboratory conditions and a successful clinical trial run in pets. Potential health benefits include increased resistance against oxidative stress, improved life-span and immune stimulation. Qrill: Antarctic qrill is a breakthrough ingredient providing a bioavailable matrix of proteins, omega-3 phospholipids and astaxanthin. Qrill or Euphausia superba phospholipids have been clinically proven to promote brain development, skin health, active joints and body composition. Xylo-oligsaccharides (XOS): super probiotics obtained by hydrolysis of corn cobs. XOS in the diet resists salivary, gastric and pancreatic enzymes. XOS limits energy wasting fermentations which are often a source of digestive discomfort and flatulencies. The selective proliferation of Bifidobacteria and Lactobacilli, stimulates synthesis of Short Chain Fatty Acids (SCFA) in the colon. The acidifying effect of SCFA counters potential pathogenic bacteria, promotes toxin neutralisation and keeps minerals in ionic configuration increasing bioavailability. SCFA serve as an available energy source to promote the regeneration of epithelial cell, increase the villus height, which induces a larger area of epithelial villus cells that could facilitate absorption of nutrients. Ingredients: Dehydrated lamb meat protein, dehydrated chicken protein, brown rice, maize, wheat, chicken oil, dried antarctic qrill (euphauisa superba) (4%), hydrolysed chicken liver, whey powder, brewer's yeast, carob flour, xylo-oligosaccharide (400 ppm), rosmarinus sp. - curcuma sp. - vitis sp. - citrus sp. - eugenia sp. (300 ppm). Additives: Vitamin A (E-672): 18000 IU/kg, Vitamin D3 (E-671): 1500 IU/kg, Vitamin E (3A700): 150 mg/kg, Vitamin C (E301): 200 mg/kg, Iron (E1): 150 mg/kg, Iodine (E2): 1.5 mg/kg, Copper (E4): 15 mg/kg, Manganese (E5): 70 mg/kg, Zinc (E6): 180 mg/kg, Selenium (E8): 0.3 mg/kg, Preservatives - Antioxidants.
